betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Dineutronium (DNT)§f is the §bultimate material tier§f in HBM's Nuclear Tech, surpassing even Euphemium. It has atomic number 0 - an "exotic" element consisting of two neutrons.

§eHow to Obtain:§f
Requires §bParticle Accelerator§f (power level 12,500+) and §bExposure Chamber§f.
§bRecipe:§f §e1x Sparkticle Capsule + 8x Ferric Schrabidate = 8x DNT Ingots§f

§eUses:§f
• §bDNT Compound Plates§f - Crafted on §bTier 7 Anvil§f (too hard for Stamp Mill)
  Recipe: 4 DNT ingots + Desh ingots + Spark Blend
• §bElectronium Ingots§f - Advanced circuitry material
• §bDFC§f (Digamma Field Containment) reaction catalysts
• §bDNT Nano Suit§f - §aThe most powerful armor in the mod§f
• §bFEnSU§f - Massive high-capacity energy storage
• §bSpark Singularity§f - High-tier energy component
• §bSpark Batteries§f - Highest-tier energy cells

§c§4PROCESSING NOTES:§f
• §cCannot be stamped§f - requires Tier 7 Anvil for all plates
• Nuggets exist in NEI but are unobtainable
• Extremely resource-intensive to produce

§aTip:§f This is the pinnacle of material progression. Reaching DNT means you're approaching the end of the mod.
